title: lastrea scabrosa
intro: Lastrea scabrosa, also known as the Rough Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Lastrea scabrosa include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and a treatment for digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
